title: dalbergia millettii
intro: Dalbergia millettii, also known as Hongmu or Dalbergia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to southern China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dalbergia millettii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as improving cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, Dalbergia millettii is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
